name: WS11 meeting dispatcher (transcript -> MOM -> 3 extractions -> pipeline run)

meta.description: WS11 build item 3. Entry point of the meeting-to-delivery pipeline. The meeting bot POSTs a completed recording to /webhook/mtg/recording-complete (bridge-secret header, at-least-once — dedupe on meetingId). The dispatcher: (1) verifies the secret + resolves the transcript, (2) llm.summarize -> MOM, (3) THREE separate targeted llm.extract passes (prd|report|scope) each returning {content,confidence}, (4) pipeline.createRun with all three stages populated (artifact + confidence) in one call. The `pipeline.run.created` event the platform emits is what the delivery/report/scope sub-workflows subscribe to (event->n8n bridge) — the fan-out is event-driven, not a direct Execute Workflow. Backbone rule holds: every action is an mcp-hub tools/call under the OBO identity wf:mtg-dispatcher (scoped to media.transcribe, llm.summarize, llm.extract, pipeline.createRun, pipeline.updateStage, notify). v1 requires body.transcript; audioRef-only transcription is a later enhancement. v1 inlines MOM + extracted markdown into mom_ref/artifact_ref (a storage service replaces this later). Env: N8N_BRIDGE_SECRET, HUB_SERVICE_TOKEN.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: "2.0", id: 1, method: "tools/call", params: { name: "llm.summarize", arguments: { text: $('Verify + dedupe + resolve transcript').first().json.transcript } } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: "2.0", id: 2, method: "tools/call", params: { name: "llm.extract", arguments: { kind: "prd", text: $('Verify + dedupe + resolve transcript').first().json.transcript } } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: "2.0", id: 3, method: "tools/call", params: { name: "llm.extract", arguments: { kind: "report", text: $('Verify + dedupe + resolve transcript').first().json.transcript } } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: "2.0", id: 4, method: "tools/call", params: { name: "llm.extract", arguments: { kind: "scope", text: $('Verify + dedupe + resolve transcript').first().json.transcript } } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: "2.0", id: 5, method: "tools/call", params: { name: "pipeline.createRun", arguments: $json.args } }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, runId: $json.runId, deduped: $json.deduped, prdConfidence: $json.prdConfidence }) }}
